channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Day 1653 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 38 replies — 152.0/hr

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-07 09:47 UTC

61933206
>>61933100
Alhamdulillah, snail

61933306
>>61933100
Whats he gonna do when we hit $1M?

61933408
Your bot broke.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61934682
salty

61935149
buump

61935162
>>61933306
Post every day until it hits 10 million

61935165
>>61933100
inshallah

61935391
ayatollah snailola

61935537
snaily snail

61936241
we need more snails

61936765
uuuup

61936943
>>61933100
You are a fraud.
Pic related is what you actually are.

61937137
>>61936943

61938019
up

61938023
Stop

61938297
day 3 of snailbumping every day until the 'log is nothing but snailposting

61938380
>>61938023
No, bump snail threads until the /biz/ catalog is nothing but snails.

61938461
ok

61938624
>>61938297
stop. the jannies have encountered this trolling before and have a lazy approach to it, date based auto-sages. But it kills long running threads that are quality. you + their lazys asses WILL kill the board.

61939084
>>61938624
kek sounds like it will only get the pmg trannies buttmad
lets do it

61939451
>>61938624
They do it for FREE. Let that sink in.

61939566
>>61938624
>But it kills long running threads that are quality

There are no quality threads on biz you retard.
There are only retarded spam threads like "500k is life changing money" or "OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO" cope threads.
So we might as well have fun with these spam snail threads.

61941094
more snails

61941500
SNAILS IS LOVE SNAIL IS LIFE

61942081
upp

61943177
ssnail

61943550
>>61943518
terrible idea

61943559
>>61943518
you shilling your pajeeted babylon juice its even worth somehow

61945550
snailola where ya go ta?

61945962
ssssssssssssssssssssss

61945991
hellooo

61948615
day 5 of snailbumping every day until the 'log is nothing but snailposting

61948783
>>61943559
still interesting seeing btc used without wrapping or custodians while earning at the same time though.

item.title: Biz fucking sucks — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Biz fucking sucks

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-07 09:48 UTC

OP

I came here thinking people would be doing deep dives and making economic models to map future earnings. I realize most people here don't even know what a PFP is let alone a factor of production or an AVC line. So most of you have never deeply studied economics and this board seems to exist as some sort of "Cult of Cope" where you live in a shared imagined reality where you are rich for buying internet tokens...

Early replies (first 3)

61948342
Ok boomer

61948349
>>61948339
It used to be 100x better

61948356
Ok how about you make the model first and then I'll make the next one

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61948382
>>61948339
sounds like goyim shit desu

61948385
So post your delusion charts first instead of some ho

61948391
>>61948339

61948468
>>61948339
So pfp is a profile picture? What else are you talking about? You are going to have to take the lead here OP, if you know something I don't please say something

61948479
We're just dealing in the real world

61948687
>>61948339
Built for BBC male gaze.

61948703
>>61948339
would unironically destroy that slampig

61948720
>>61948339
>comes here thinking people will share information with economic value for free
>thinks he is the smart one
You so smart you should watch youtubers for more tips and tricks

61948740
>>61948339
It's tough out there bro, try to be more understanding.

61948749
>>61948339
Turns out chuds and schizos aren’t very intelligent people…

61948786
>>61948339
>>61948703
You can have my sloppy seconds CuckFaggot.

item.title: WTF? How did no one think of this? — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF? How did no one think of this?

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-07 09:47 UTC

OP

>omg! the strait is blocked! what will asian economies do??? the price will be through the moon!!!
>South Korea: *caps the price*
https://koreajoongangdaily.joins.com/news/2026-03-06/englishStudy/bilingualNews/Iran-war-triggers-unprecedented-gasoline-price-cap-in-Korea-KOR/2538496

Early replies (first 3)

61948456
>>61945188
I thought they were on electric already

61948633
Bibi figured this was the last chance to get the US stuck in Iran.

61948646
>>61945188
wow that's genius can't we put a price tag on everything and make poverty illegal?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61948673
>>61945188
Can they do this with megayachts? I need one

61948675
>>61948646
I guarantee "we" could. I also guarantee (((they))) wont

61948680
>>61948646
Poverty cannot legally touch you without your consent, just say no.

61948713
>>61945188
price cap shortages are no joke. good luck korea, hope it does more good than bad

61948772
>>61945188
Sure they can do a domestic price cap, but aren't they still buying the oil internationally at a massive loss?

61948775
Damn that sounds like communism. maybe korean reunification is closer than we think

61948782
>>61945188
>its_a_social_construct_just_dont_let_it_inflate.webm

item.title: BAT bros I don't feel so good — 43 replies — 80.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BAT bros I don't feel so good

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-03-07 09:22 UTC

OP

Eich scammed us I just hope we get back to 20c so I can dump this shit

Early replies (first 3)

61942645
Nigga you have to wait a full fucking year. It dumps consistently in December-January, so buy now and dump then.

The eich nigger will never ever employ actual use cases for this token because he and his team are scared little faggots.

The president and his entire family have publicly rug pulled multiple times and nothing has come of it negatively for them. Brendan eich is just a scared little faggot do nothing bitch boy.

61942696
>>61942058
>>61942645
I solded after I saw Eich namedropped in the epstein files.

61942728
>>61942058
Who would've thought 27 cents would be the local top for BAT

the highs get lower

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947061
>>61942696
Oh shit, was he really?

>>61943276
Sorry about your losses, lad. Hope you recouped.

61947085
>>61946916
you know what else you can dump? these webms

61947107
>>61943410
Since May 2017

61947151
>>61947061
who the fuck has washing machine in the kitchen. What tasteless whore. Let me guess, toilet bowl is in the bedroom?

61947166
>>61947085
Make a request, lad. I'll check every once in a while between my vidya grinding.

>>61947107
Based OG.

>>61947151
Based reposter. I dropped that one a few threads ago.

61947258
>>61946916
>>61947166
HOLY FUCKKKKK
got any big nigress booba

61947261
As shitty as bat is the community has always been solid

61947270
>>61944901
>>61946916
You're standing in front of a burning pile of money that you refuse to extinguish on the off chance that burning your money somehow makes you richer?

61947278
>>61947166
>>61947151
>>61947061
>>61946916
based thot poster

61947296
>>61943085
>hope Eich dumps it to zero, replaces BAT with stablecoins, and they get every use case in Brave you bitched about having.
The rational way to do this is Brendan launches his own stablefuck and he pays dividends with BAT. Problem is, he’s too smart to get in over his head with crapto. He was mentioned in the Epstein files but they couldn’t get him on the island. We’re not dealing with a retard like Brock Pierce or a based patriot like Nikolai from MKR. Brendan survives because he’s not too greedy or too political other his absolute hatred of faggots

61947372
>>61947296
Spoken like a terminal baggie. That's not rational at all. Make his own stablecoin so he can get raped by American finance? Then pay dividends in BAT so he can get raped again? Dividends for what? Paid to who? Why would a browser company get a banking license and why would they pay dividends instead of charge a fee so they can make a profit for once.

61947466
>>61947166
some gifted TnA in a razor thin bikini

61947742
>>61947258
I got you next post. Light or dark skinned?

>>61947270
I've been selling off a lot of BAT recently. Not at these prices though. I'll probably keep a good amount just because I'm that retarded.

I have other investments, I get a solid salary, and I have several income streams. Does it suck to lose out holding BAT? Sure, but it is what it is.

>>61947466
Like this? If not or you want a different body type, be as specific as you want.

61947792
>>61946916
its something else entirely. its big.

61947892
>>61947792
I'll take the bait for the sake of hopium kek. Even if something big is coming, its likely far too late desu.

>>61947466
Here's another for you.

>>61947278
Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT.

61947959
>>61946916
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
YOUR CONTENT IS AMAZING

61947966
>>61947892
it depends on what that thing is. in this case, i wouldnt say its necessarily too late. i guess we'll see.

61948112
>>61947892
Moar please

61948155
>>61946916
>the perfect ass does not exist

61948157
>>61947966
What can you tell us?

61948171
>>61947892
>Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT

Doesn't feel very based but I'm glad there are at least a few of us suffering together

also, requesting my threadly dose of big booty latinas and/or brown girls

61948211
>>61948157
Heres a clue without giving it away completely. What did RH just announce?

61948488
>>61947892
>>61947742
Based thanks very much as always TP. Keep up the good work.

61948551
>tfw thotposter leaves the thread

pack it in, show's over. See you all next week

61948607
>>6194789
Lost
>>61948551
Tp has been super active lately, xhe will post later today most likely

61948610
>>61947892
Lost

61948617
>>61948607
>xhe will post later today most likely

Ok, but I want more thots right now.

61948640
>>61948617
Good point. tp was posting some gold earlier.

61948750
>>61947107
God damn. Didn’t think anyone that far back would still be around.

61948758
>>61947107
Forgot about this image lol

item.title: >biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to… — 66 replies — 55.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
>biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to…

Open thread • Replies: 66 • Updated: 2026-03-07 08:43 UTC

OP

>biggest oil shock since 1973
>literally the worst case economic scenario
>he STILL hasn't sold
Some people just want to lose money.

Early replies (first 3)

61942069
Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
they don't want to anger china and Europe

61942088
last time I checked bitcoin is mostly mined with clean coal and waterfall generators so tell me why it matters

61942092
May panic sell tomorrow. Already got fucked holding over one weekend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61943169
>>61942065
80 is cheap 200 would be a shock

61943223
>>61942065
>literally the worst case economic scenario
You mean AI bubble?

61943248
The economy will collapse in two more weeks

61943302
>>61942065
>Trump can't back off because it would be a catastrophic look for the US if they lost to Iran in a fucking week
>also kikes would never allow it because of Kiketropolis "security concerns"
Anon....what are you waiting for....? Do you WANT to lose money?

61943311
>>61942069
FPBP literally that simple

61943436
>what is covid
Oil went bonkers like a dozen times since 2020, we had literally negative crud but muh 1973

61943514
>>61942065
It is moving quicker than I thought. I sold everything yesterday. Even my oil stocks, might miss out on the upside, but I have a suspicion that if there is a crash it is going to affect everything.

61943602
>>61942069
Trust the plan
Patriots are in control!

61943631
>>61943436
>what was covid
A perfect time to buy? So by that analogy now should be a perfect time to sell because oil is going in the opposite direction

61943663
I want to short. I really want. But this stupid ass market is completely delusional and gulping Trump's tweets like good sperm.
We had yet another illustration of this just two days ago when muh insurance mechanism, strait is open, navy will proteec ur ass, trust us, and thus oil started to dump.
Which obviously was a load of fucking bullshit as tankers got hit in the meantime.
And now the narrative being pushed is Shitran's ballistic missiles launch is going down exponentially. Well, sure, but they sure as fuck didn't hit tankers with fucking ballistic missiles.
One drone. One. One a day hitting a tanker.
That's all it takes to make the strait permanently closed.

But the fucktarded market being the fucktarded ape it is, it can't see that. no, it will trust any lie from the administration to pump it.
How is anyone supposed to short in these conditions, and how much can you fuck up with price discovery before it becomes a complete catastrophe spiling out of control.
I fucking hate these retards. Everyone in this dumb market, everyone in this fucktarded administration, and basically, every fucking one.

61943678
>>61942281
>exports mostly to china
>china needs oil
>china buys oil from other suppliers
>china slurps (You)r oil btw
>it's allowed because the west needs their temu shit
>oil price skyrockets globally

61943692
>>61943663
KWAB

61946145
>>61942558
>Reducing the supply of oil increases the price, since the demand will remain the same or increase.
No, the demand will not stay the same if the ones who demand it require it to keep demanding it in the first place. If the oil-importing economies can not sustain the expense of importation their economies will be less productive and have less money to import oil. If you had a population and during a drought you'd let some of them starve the demand for food during and after the drought would not stay the same as some people died and the other ones won't just start eating more simply because they survived.

>>61942752
>They did for some countries.
Most I heard was two tankers. I wouldn't call that a reopening of the strait.

61946502
>>61942069
I heard 2 more weeks from my sources

61946529
Last year around this time everybody was screaming about tarrifs ending the economy and wow would you look at that NOTHING HAPPENED

61946548
>>61942065
>biggest oil shock since 1973
Is it? I'm not in the US and prices here are normal only stocks went a little up, but they have being going up for quite some time.

61946711
>>61942069
>Europe
lol

61946723
>>61942065
Silver spikes after oil shocks.

61947257
>>61942178
Shit nigga, 6 years? But /this time could be different/ if iran is ripped and the straight is opened

61947267
I won't sell because I have nothing to sell. I am dog shit stupid and I don't know anything about stocks or jewels or crypto I just come here for funsies

61947378
>>61942069
Its already open for china you fucking idiot

61947387
>>61942281
Your logic would be correct, however, Jews.

61947442
>>61942069
Modern Europe is a neutered whimpering dog. "Angering" them is a null point.

61947483
>>61943678
>Implying China will be getting even one (1) drop of oil from the world market after they're blockaded (Which is next after Iran)

Anon, the world will bend down and kiss America's boot and like it. Nobody will be able to force ships through the trade lanes the moment we just start sinking anything with a foreign flag that has not been cleared by the DoD.

61948690
>>61947483
Good luck blocking russia from supplying china with oil migatard

61948691
>>61947483
Whose we?

61948692
>>61942069
probably true desu
I think they just said they won't be targeting "other countries" already.

61948696
>>61942092
Don't do it. Never do it. Just top up if it plummets

61948701
im panic fucking selling on monday, what the fuck was I even thinking

61948708
>>61942065
Thanks jews.

item.title: It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war — 72 replies — 55.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war

Open thread • Replies: 72 • Updated: 2026-03-07 08:36 UTC

OP

And that's a nothingburger

Early replies (first 3)

61942258
????? It means we bomb the shit out of them wdym

61942268
>>61942181
I hate being American over the last decade so much, all we do is lose and embarrass ourselves... how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources? Meanwhile China will do nothing and win again and I will gave to endure all of 4chan laughing at us... I want to support China but I can't into Chinese women. Europe needs to become a superpower and dethrone China and America so I can cheer them on without reservations.

61942402
>>61942268
>how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources?
Bombing a mountain just creates a field

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61943695
>>61942268
We aren’t doing total war on these goat fuckers. We wouldn’t even be fucking Iran up if those retarded sand niggers wouldn’t have been killing their citizens en masse. They were warned. Iran is a bit different from most of those goat fucking sand niggers and they have a chance to not be a mudslime shit hole.

61944174
>>61942633
>>61943349
Of course they want to win. It's just that whether they win or lose the right people will still make money

>>61942535
The evangelical death cult are staunchly pro-Israel

61944402
>>61943603
>>61943623
Go back to the bunker rockets are in the air.

61944406
america cant win this war because there is no win state
if they blow iran off the face of the earth they gain nothing and lose a lot

61944540
>>61942268
>all we do

there is no "we"

america is not a culture, it's a business

here this scene should help: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TkVt-hTU6E4

61944596
>>61944406
>america cant win this war

see this post >>61942633 and then do some reading on the iraq war and how much money dick cheney / haliburton made at this time

61944611
>>61942268
This is a paid foreign operative btw

61944630
>>61942633
Checked, based, and redpilled.

61944680
>>61944611
I am American anon.

61944998
>>61942258
Inverse Cramer meme

61945056
>>61942181
Oil is at $91 and rising. This can only mean one thing: this special military operation will be clearly over in two weeks.

61945242
>>61944596
yeah trump and his family will be winning, but america won't be, this is afghanistan but even worse

61945267
Jim Cramer opposite rule, everything he says, the opposite is true

61945542
>If you get bombed and all your leaders killed, you win

such retarded logic

61945560
>>61945542
Worked for Vietnam and Afghanistan though.

61945575
>>61944540
That's what the elites want you to think. America is ruled by Christian Zionists and Frankists and they're motivated by their religious beliefs, not just profit. Here this Chinese lecture series should help:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lt8XLz78ZvY

61945631
>>61942181
>Supreme Leader killed
>all of his buddies are killed
>every time a new person steps up to run the show they get killed
>"This is how we win >:)"

Why are foreigners like this?

61945648
>>61945575
>Professor Jiang

Fucking kek. This is the same retard who claims that Hannibal Barca didn't exist. He just hates Western Culture and White people and wants to re-write Western history.

If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink). It's not hard to tell where the resentment comes from. Very common amongst asians btw.

You're either a paid shill, brown, asian, or very very fucking stupid to be pushing this astroturfed angry chink.

61946117
>>61942572
>Iran showed weakness,
Maybe, however I don't value that reading much. I wouldn't put it behind israel to act in this way though.

61946193
Just like Afghanistan.

61946198
>>61945631
Its a lot of TDS with extra stuff in between
I almost feel bad for the normies that get sucked into the propaganda stream. The world is much easier to read, ironically without the "news" telling you what is going on (what to think)

61946252
>>61945575
LOL i saw that video going around the other day. i need to sit down and watch it soon just for a laugh

61946276
>>61945575
Zionism is simply one head of the luciferian snake. There are many, and many are highly prominent in the world.
Don't confuse it with christianity just because they hide their disdain for the Creator most of the time

61946337
>>61946276
This

61946383
>>61942478
>They killed the leader, they rejects diplomatic offers which eliminated the possibility of iran creating a nuclear arsenal.
retard take, who the fuck told you that horseshit? and why are you dumb enough to believe them?

>>61942513
literally the only good thing about Iran is that they resisted the centraI banking carteI kikes tyranny, everything else about the government is awful, i want to call Iran Persia again, like the Iranian expats i occassionally speak to at my job who insist they're Persian, no Iranian.

61946430
>>61945648
>If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink).

i know a LOT of asians, some literally do get bullied for being gooks, usually by non-whites, but still, it scars them. Often them simply having a white friend, which is all some of them ever want, is enough to cure that entirely however.

>>61945242
its impossible for it to be worse than afghanistan, you either didn't live through it because you're a zoomer who failed school, or you're a retarded, lying shill.

>>61944680
so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free? thats even more pathetic anon, assuming you aren't lying. You're definitely turd-skinned though.

>>61943623
JlDF arriving quickly it seems, why arent you fighting on the frontlines Vile Schlomo? go on, your people want their greater lsraeI? go work for it.

>>61943610
its a real shame that all this anti-semitism that's popped up has once again completely missed this point huh?
>hurr jooz bad
>whats a central bank? i dunno
fucking npcs will never wake up.

61948084
>>61946430
>so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free?
I am white but I am a poorfag loser it's true. Not trying to astroturf anything, that's genuinely how I feel about it.

61948208
>>61943069
there are american ones too but their job isnt to shill, its to create conflict between us poors so that we dont eat the rich. all the tranny posting is by them.

61948661
>>61942181
Around 2011 Stefan Molyneux, libertarians and the tea party were saying the US Government was in $14 trillion of debt and there is no way the forever wars can continue. Look at us now.

https://odysee.com/@freedomain:b/another-imperial-quagmire-dr-ivan-eland:c

61948695
>>61943665
What an inane schizo rant. There is not a single indication for this to be true.

item.title: Day 1652 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 38 replies — 39.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1652 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-07 08:57 UTC

OP

Day 1652 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

61927155
>>61927118
snail

61927206
no buys

no sells

is this the end of the s curve

61927222
>>61927118

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61930913
>>61927118
>>61913899
You missed posting one for 2/28.
Here's your 2/27: >>61913899
>Day 1650
Here's your 3/01: >>61922023
>Day 1651
Here's your 3/02: >>61927118
>Day 1652

No 2/28 in existence, it should have been 1651 in your sequence but instead you made that post on 3/01.

61931200
>>61927118
cute

61932194
hello little snail

61932307
>>61930913
Yeah I know, often as not I got shit to do. I'm not at my phone or computer 24/7

61932579
made up count

61932624
fraud

61932668
snaail plague

61933327
day 2 of snailbumping every day until the 'log is nothing but snailposting

61934031
>>61927118
fake, fraud & fag

kys

61934323
ssssnailed

61934675
hennlo

61935146
bummp

61935386
silly little snaily snail

61935529
snaily snaily

61936237
snail board

61936756
uuup

61936937
>>61933327
Keep bumping the thread!
When 10 snail threads are up at the same time, the snail can't post a new thread anymore.
It has happened before and was absolutely hilarious to watch.

61938018
>>61936937

item.title: THE BIGGEST CRASH SINCE COVID IS ABOUT TO HAPPEN — 54 replies — 33.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE BIGGEST CRASH SINCE COVID IS ABOUT TO HAPPEN

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-03-07 08:19 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61947028
>>61947021
Trump's done. He's getting raped in the courts now too.

61947037
>>61947021
Yea the biggest oil crash since covid is about to happen.

61947059
All of this was planned so kikes can buy up everything left on the cheap. The "if you didn't make it before 2025" guy was shitposting, but if you didn't buy bitcoin in 2011 and just hold without being a drug dealer or whatever you're boned forever and it will never get better. Welcome to the future.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947307
>>61947167
Modern leftists are just rabid dogs that attack with whatever ammo they think they have available. They are not sending their best

61947348
>>61947089
This, they are just as cucked as Russians, even though they are all about muh guns. Yeah muh guns they're not using.

61947390
>>61947348
Putin is at least a dictator, so Russians have some excuse.
Trump technically isn't a dictator. All the famous American "levers of democracy" are still in place and he can be legally stopped or removed from power. But Americans just don't care. They really don't care that their president does whatever he pleases and that he pisses in their face every day.

61947513
>>61947021
The biggest pump, you mean. This is a repeat of 2001 with potential to be 2001 + 1979.
Remember the dot com bubble?
Now we have the AI bubble.
Remember the war with Iraq?
Now we have the war with Iran.

2020 was the start of a new super cycle. The end of that super cycle is the popping of the AI bubble which will crash S&P and NVDA.

61947571
I thought the US would collapse slowly but this orange retard is going for a speedrun

61947582
>>61947307
That's makes them honestly as dangerous as the mask off left variation of Germanies 1930s variation. Contrary to their post-1945 variations that to some degree understood that they are just grifters and scammers that for the most part just performed the dance of the true believer, the current batch has been grown on their own propaganda as a dogmatic truth and nourished into blind belief by grifters and opportunists. I don't think I am taking it too far when calling for a preemptive culling in the interest of the right that after nearly 80 years of Boomer and Silent retardations finds back to its roots and unironically yids that despite having been not been innocent in being part of the nourishing group are still their favorite scapegoat

61947584
Im hiding in US Treasuries

61947585
>>61947118
>migger
Back to your containment board >>>/pol/

61947604
I should have bought hundreds of oil drums /biz/...

61947605
>>61947134
Lol

61947606
Doesn't the big cme gap this pump left behind mean it's gonna come back down at some point

61947611
>oil rapidly becoming irrelevant thanks to electric cars/trucks

But instead we'll stagnate ourselves to maintain status quo

61947639
>>61947611
What do you think creates the electricity you use, doofus ass?

61947665
>>61947582
I don't disagree
They've been fed a steady diet of reality distortion for so long they've been broken. Which also sounds harsh, but coming from academia, I was on the same path for a long time. The deprogramming takes a long time and leaves scars on the psyche that never really go away, especially after knowing what the big picture worldview is by these groups

61947674
>>61947390
>implying this is somehow different than every potus of the last 150 years, minus the GOAT Coolidge

61947713
>>61947665
I really don't want to know how those temples of the true believing priests have evolved since I jumped ship in the mid 10s. Still some part of me believes that for deprogramming shattering the core orthodoxy of the national socialists not being right wing but an offshoot and logical end point off the lefts own totalitarian, eugenic and utopian instinct might be a non bloody way to get some to vomit in disgust at their own mirror image and renounce. Though simply taking the rabies dogs behind the shed is the more save and economic rational lane

61947717
>>61947021
I voted for this

61947726
>>61947021
I didn't vote for this but I wish I did

61947804
Is there any case for a bullish market anytime in the next few months? Everything I’m seeing indicates it will be bear for the foreseeable future.

61947984
>>61947028
Ah yes, we're now at year 9 of "T-the walls are finally closing in on Trump. They'll arrest him any day now!"
Just two more weeks!

61948049
>>61947639
Sun?

61948065
>>61947028
I want to see that fascist pig rot in jail so much it burns

61948121
>>61948065
You have a mental illness, kill yourself

61948129
>>61947585
Take your own advice migger, orange nigger is costing this board millions

61948142
>>61948121
How is the weather in Moscow?

61948165
>>61948121
Least psychotic Trump voter.

61948300
>>61947028
this the blue wave is going to be brutal and the democrats are going to investigate and impeach this piece of shit i hope hes prepared for 2 years of hell

61948614
>>61947021
The same thing happened in 2008 with oil. Meanwhiel we just got a headline nonfarm payroll that was negative and missed by 142,000, and multiple revisions, one which brought December 2025 to be negative, with more revisions coming, despite the gig economy massively masking the atrocious jobs market. They chose this time intentionally for Iran for a number of reasons (missile build, alongside dump of so much other disappointing admin action months before the midterms, in sequence of Venezuela before Cuba is added on etc.), not least of which financial. Credit (especially private) markets are breaking, global central bank credit is rolling over, Hindenburg omens stacking, net savings as a % of gross national income going negative for the first time since 1929, bull steepening while the 2 year is mirroring behavioral crisis onset, 10 sigma VaR daily moves between asset class split plays on momentum moving between Korean stocks and bitcoin, bank heads messaging 2008 part deux and warning of a cyber attack from Iran, etc. Markets were going to crash anyways before anyone even mentioned Iran, this is just the narrative, just like repo blowing up in September 2019 and then March 2020 (covid) and 2001 (9/11). Oil priced in yen triggering unwind in global carry leverage will be a catalyst and spark for the rest. Look out below and buy when we're there. It's about to happen again.

61948663
>>61948614
Bad economy is good for recruitment.

61948671
>>61947021
>buy crude oil leveraged short ETF
>????
>profit

61946445
I bet her blowjobs are so legendary they qualify as a religious experience. She sucks the soul right out of your body through your balls. It's probably a heavenly journey that makes you see God and question your entire existence.

61946660
>>61946372
I enjoy my job OP. I also don't live in my mother's basement. Life is good!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61946955
>>61946372

61947014

61948257
>>61946445
I bet all her orifices are like that.

61948264
>>61946372

61948353

-Mr. Bezos. (your boss)

61948371

He took the bog pill?

61948397

61948400

61948417
>>61948400

61948457

item.title: The US has 10 days — 97 replies — 28.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 97 • Updated: 2026-03-07 06:33 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61940124
>>61938341

61940215
>>61940124
advanced money doctor

61940234
>>61938370
OP has been warned, he must evacuate his balls ASAP

61940472
>>61938341
This special combat operation will be over in 2 weeks, just like Ukraine

61940500
>>61939974
>only Republicans voted for war
Remember the reaction from Democrats when Trump pulled troops out of Syria?

61940570
>>61938402

A "launcher" can be made from about 3 scaffolding poles and a bungee cord. Iran has or had 80,000 drones. Trump dun goofed here when Israel tricked him into this.

61941344
>>61938341
How is Lutnick making money off this?

61941358
>>61938399
We'll explode the nuklear just like in the bibble.

61941381
>>61941358
>Middle Eastern Christians
I don't get why people bring up a nearly non-existent group. 99% of them convered to Islam either by choice or by force over the last 1,400 years.

61941414
>>61938341
So in two weeks?

61941712
>>61941381
>over the last 25 years*
Ftfy

61942683
>>61938601
Ships have been transiting the strait by the simple expedient of turning off their transponders.

61942707
I don't mind if Israel and the US want to be retarded in their own little sandboxes, but why do they have to drag the rest of the world into it

61942764
>>61938506
The only thing that matters is that the US is the first to achieve AGI. >>61938487
Is on to something here. This move, which seems to be such a blunder, is the only thing that can set China and the EU back enough for the US to win the AI race.

61942831
>>61938341
>The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz
No.
>or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)
Nobody cares.
> on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day.
Ok, sot there's 1/4 of all oil that isn't getting to EU and UK.
So, oil price will go up.
>Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW
It'll be $100 - 150 .
I guess EU and UK should have not sanctioned Russia, tough luck now.

61942837
>>61938345
Wholly retard.
Trump made US oil independent during first term, and US is top 3 oil producing country now.
Oil price going up means US gov will have more money to balance the budget.

61942844
>>61942831

BOND YIELDS will crash the economy, not oil itself. With a structural 15m daily barrel deficit oil will go up every week. The only way to destroy demand is recession, oil will go up until it reaches the breaking point for global growth and blows everything up.

There is no feelings or opinions to this. Shutting the strait is a 15m barrel deficit. Ask any energy expert that that does to prices. It’s 150-200

61942850
>>61942837

Has nothing to do with US energy production because crude is a global market. Just ask yourself what would happen if the 30 year yield went to 7%. That’s a 30-45% dump in equities

61942851
>>61942837
I'm sure Joe Shcmo on the street is going to be happy paying 2 dollars a litre to fund Israel. Do you NEET retards really live in such a vacuum?

61942854
Crypto will pump. The thesis for crypto has always been based on the collapse of the system

61942897
>>61942854
Crypto is fiat with extra steps
No fiat, no crypto

61944577
One week in so far. WTI: 65-90
If this continue another week we will see 125 WTI and markets down 5%

61944640
>>61938341
>What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.
So the XRP domino theory is playing out?
Bullish for XRP?

61945025
>>61938402
>Anything bigger than that is already dead
It was literally yesterday that Iran launched a Khoramshahr-4, the biggest missile in their arsenal, at Tel Aviv

61945048
>>61942837
The US oil sector is small compared to the rest of the US economy. It is privately owned, so the bulk of profits go to private shareholders, not the government.

61945281
>>61938425
If you are good at reading body language you can see when they are together Bibi has nothing but contempt for Trump, it is because bibi has seen all the VHS tapes, he knows he owns his ass and treats him like a dog to do his bidding

61945399
>>61939987
More prideful of their shah maybe, only retards give a shit about the Ayatollah.

61945481
This Is the end.
Bye bye USA.
Bye bye israHell

61945896
>>61938341

61948489
>>61945481

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 15 replies — 26.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-03-07 09:21 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757

61933779
>>61932834

i dont sell my dotty

61936705

item.title: AI BUBBLE IS POPPING — 94 replies — 23.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
AI BUBBLE IS POPPING

Open thread • Replies: 94 • Updated: 2026-03-07 05:57 UTC

OP

It’s finally happening. THIS IS WHY NVDA DUMPED AFTER EARNINGS

Early replies (first 3)

61946639
two more weeks

61946643
>>61946600
@grok is this true?

61946647
priced out and off kirk af

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947740
>>61946677
Asking grok to verify the truth of something is different than asking for an explanation you fucking retard.

61947782
>>61947740
You do understand how rag works? Grok has no epistemic conscious, it has no truth or knowledge, it just aggregates data. I am currently running experiments on data poisoning and your lot is the reason I am escalating, its likely possible to destroy the current ontology of the internet for the price of a two course meal

61947826
>>61946600
Are you stupid? Why would this be bad? Everyone was bearish about this GOING AHEAD.

61947874
>>61947075
It's pretty good but I use it mainly for AutoLISP. I've had to throw it between agents and it's had to get debug information from CAD to figure out how to implement something. It's a learning process though and I'll be sure to include that in my prompt next time

61947886
>>61947782
no need, LLMs are already destroying themselves with synthetic data

61947901
>>61947160
>I pay $250 a month for Gemini Ultra

Which is still losing them money, they need over $1000 per user per month to break even.

61947909
>>61947633
>People already use it every day for all kinds of things - cooking, translating, asking for cost estimates, medical and legal questions, and so on and so on.

And how does this make money?

61947912
>>61947901
citation?
>>61947886
citation?
>>61947909
see >>61947160

61947952
>>61946763
>+35% productivity for junior level workers (i.e. interns, coops, and associate level work)
>+0% productivity for intermediate level workers
>-9% productivity for senior level workers that have to babysit dog shit LLMs and fix the hallucinations
Additionally
>in recent studies it's confirmed that AI is dog shit at IC work but is 5-10X more effective at middle management
So we make it harder for Zoomers to get entry level roles and eradicate the path to management for Millennials. Thereby sandbagging all of the younger generations, again. Older Millennials and younger GenX still take a productivity loss because the tools are so ass.

How does this help anyone?

61947977
>>61947644
>Anone whos in their 30s will use this and realize it basically gives you the same results as what google would give you 15 or so years ago before the internet became flooded with bullshit slop.

But you don’t realize how much more effective it is.
For some tax bullshit that used to drive you crazy researching as a self-employed person, ChatGPT now gives you the answer in a few seconds.

61947985
>>61946728
>Windows Xp/7 booted in 10 seconds
no it fucking didn't you lying nigger.

61948000
>>61947977
Deloitte already got pegged for advising on tax fraud because they used AI models thay gave incorrect information which fucked their clients. Don't use AI for taxes you retard. If actual "smart people" can't make it work then your normie ass definitely can't make it work.

61948008
>>61947952
Let me know when AI can create jobs.

61948009
>>61947952
Gutting career pathways provides shareholder value

61948011
>>61948000
I’m not talking about letting AI do your tax return (although that will probably be possible at some point too). I mean looking up specific rules. Five years ago I almost went crazy trying to figure out exactly how digital and physical sales to foreign private customers and businesses are supposed to be treated, and even my tax advisor couldn’t help me. It took forever to find the correct paragraphs (EU; it’s quite possible it’s much simpler in the US). And today ChatGPT immediately gives you the correct paragraph.

61948034
>>61946600
This is literally fake news from bloomberg. Cnbc report a half hour later confirmed the dc buildout is coming along just fine. Shit like this just underlines how eager everyone is for the bubble to pop (even the people actively betting on the ai buildout are bone-weary from the hype of it all), which is why we get these little clearing events every couple weeks off the slightest negative headline, before people realize it was a fugazi and the trillion dollar capex rollout is still, in fact, happening. But they're always glad to sell off everything in the hopes that it isn't any more.

We will continue to accelerate whether anyone likes it or not (spoiler: they will not, even if they make money off it).

61948041
>>61947565
>you're going to get steamrolled by a real lawyer
actually no. see pic related, plaintiffs attorney filed an emergency TRO and preliminary injunction. the court gave me less than 72 hours respond, even less when you consider the intentionally defective service. it would have been impossible for me to find a qualified attorney, vet them, get them to drop everything they're doing, review the 100 page packet I was served with, review hundreds of pages of my documents, secure declarations from third parties, one of which doesnt even own a car so they would have had to travel to them, and then write a 20 page memorandum in opposition with 50 pages of supporting exhibits to respond to this in time. the only way this problem could have been solved was with AI. anyways stay mad AI will make you obsolete

61948050
>>61946763
It's great for emails, as a Google Search Replacement or when I need a certain piece of advice for excel or a wifi manual.
It sucks ass with anything beyond that.
>Learn how to prompt
Doesn't stop it from hallucinating important data points. Might be fine for vibe coders at Clash of Clans, but not in financial analysis.

61948109
>>61948050
this accurately describes AI in 2023. get with the times, old man

61948182
>>61947647
>I'm so creative for telling le computer friend what to draw for me!!
Bleak
